faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Lyndhurst, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Lyndhurst typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method selected. We offer free inspections and provide detailed quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Lyndhurst homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Lyndhurst are completed in one day, with heat treatments typically taking 6-8 hours and chemical treatments requiring 2-4 hours plus follow-up visits. You can usually return to your home the same day for heat treatments or after a few hours for chemical applications, and we'll provide specific timelines during your inspection.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Lyndhurst home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we bring the temperature to lethal levels. For chemical treatments, we recommend staying away for 2-4 hours after application. Pets should also be removed during treatment, and we'll provide detailed preparation instructions specific to your chosen method.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families in Lyndhurst?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are completely safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols. Heat treatments are chemical-free and safe for all household members, while our chemical treatments use targeted applications that are safe once dried, typically within a few hours.
